title: verbascum calvum
intro: Verbascum calvum, also known as woolly mullein, is a biennial plant native to Europe, known for its tall stature and distinctive woolly leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum calvum include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in the relief of congestion, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
